latest_news.headline: Iran strikes Israeli Haifa oil refinery — first hit on Israeli energy infrastructure
latest_news.text: Iranian missile hits Haifa oil refinery. Energy Minister Cohen says 'no significant damage' reported. First Iranian strike on Israeli energy infrastructure — reciprocal escalation after Israel hit South Pars.

latest_news.headline: Iranian drone crashes into Saudi Samref refinery in Yanbu — oil loading briefly halted
latest_news.text: Iranian drone crashes into Samref refinery (Yanbu). Oil loading halted briefly, resumed after hours. Ballistic missile also intercepted heading toward port. Saudi Arabia intercepts 3 drones in eastern region same day.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials confirm South Pars attack was coordinated with US — contradicting Trump
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters South Pars attack was coordinated with Washington. Trump's public denial described as recurring pattern after fuel depot strikes weeks ago. Hegseth also repeats 'we knew nothing'.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 02. Key developments: Netanyahu press conference — Israel complies with Trump energy strike halt. Lebanon death toll crosses 1,000 with 40 healthcare workers killed. Israel expands to northern Iran strikes. Gabbard testimony controversy. Mojtaba Khamenei consolidating power. All existing signals remain stable. No de-escalation signals. Pakistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: 'I misled no one' — says Israel acted alone on Asaluyeh gas compound, Trump asked to halt energy strikes
latest_news.text: Netanyahu denies misleading US into war. Confirms Israel 'acted alone' on Asaluyeh/South Pars gas compound. Trump asked Israel to hold off on future energy strikes — Israel complying. Claims Iran can no longer enrich uranium or make ballistic missiles (unverified).

latest_news.headline: Lebanon death toll: 1,001 killed including 40 healthcare workers, 118 children — UN may consider war crimes
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 1,001 killed in Lebanon since Mar 2 (79 women, 118 children, 40 healthcare workers). 2,584 wounded. 45 killed in last 2 days alone. UN human rights chief says attacks may amount to war crimes. Amnesty urges Israel to halt attacks on healthcare facilities.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony — omitted intel contradicting Trump's Iran threat claims
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony on Iran, allegedly omitting intelligence details contradicting Trump's claims that Tehran posed an imminent nuclear threat. Supports existing signal that IC did not assess imminent threat.

latest_news.headline: Israel begins striking northern Iran for first time — geographic expansion of campaign
latest_news.text: IDF announces strikes on northern Iran — first time since war began Feb 28. Previously confined to western/central/southern targets. Geographic expansion signals widening campaign scope.

latest_news.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei declares Israel will pay for assassination of 3 senior officials in 2 days
latest_news.text: New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei (confirmed succession) vows retaliation for killings of Intelligence Minister Khatib, security chief Larijani, and Basij commander Soleimani. Iranian leadership now consolidated under Mojtaba.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 02:04 CET) — Hourly scan: (1) Netanyahu press conference: denies misleading US, says Israel acted alone on South Pars, complying with Trump energy strike halt. Claims Iran can't enrich (unverified). (2) Lebanon death toll confirmed 1,001 (40 medics, 118 children). UN, Amnesty say may be war crimes. (3) Israel expands strikes to northern Iran — first time targeting northern regions. (4) Gabbard accused of altering Senate testimony on Iran intel. (5) Mojtaba Khamenei consolidates power, vows retaliation for 3 senior official assassinations. (6) Israel-Lebanon: 45 killed in 2 days, ground invasion continuing on multiple axes. (7) No new conflict zones detected. Status quo at current levels across all trackers.
